original_prompt: Create a new python package called 'math_utils'. It must contain an __init__.py, a calc.py with a factorial function, and a test_calc.py that asserts factorial(5) == 120. Please generate them together in one pass.

tasks.title: Create math_utils/__init__.py
tasks.description: Create the __init__.py file inside the math_utils directory to mark it as a Python package.

tasks.title: Create math_utils/calc.py with factorial function
tasks.description: Create the calc.py file inside the math_utils directory and implement a factorial(n) function that computes the factorial of a non-negative integer n using recursion or iteration.

tasks.title: Create math_utils/test_calc.py
tasks.description: Create the test_calc.py file inside the math_utils directory and write a test that uses assert to verify that factorial(5) returns 120.
